subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath caused His lights to shine forth, revealed His mysteries, diffused His signs, and sent down from His Kingdom water [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی قد اشرق انواره و ظهر اسراره و شاع آثاره و انزل من ملکوته ماء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
